boundary: not a carbon-bonding-to-metric-backreaction law; not solved gravity

prediction.name: same_mass_carbon_bonding_gravity_residual

configuration_A.bonding_descriptor: higher electronic Hessian/rank or bonding-topology signal

configuration_B.bonding_descriptor: lower electronic Hessian/rank or bonding-topology signal

required_matching_controls: same total rest mass-energy within declared tolerance
same isotope inventory within declared tolerance
same external geometry within declared tolerance
same temperature band within declared tolerance
same net charge within declared tolerance
same environmental gravitational background within declared tolerance
prediction.measured_quantity: gravity residual after subtracting ordinary mass-energy/Newtonian/GR baseline
prediction.candidate_prediction: configuration_A and configuration_B have different residuals after baseline subtraction
prediction.null_prediction: residual difference is zero within measurement uncertainty
